draft.subject: Automating your lead follow-up
draft.body:
Hi David,

Sales teams get leads but lose deals because of slow follow-up. A prospect inquiry comes in, it sits in email, and 48 hours later your team gets to it. By then, they've gone elsewhere.

We automate the first response: prospect fills out your form, an AI sends them a personalized spec sheet and next steps within minutes. Your team takes over when they're engaged.

One sales team increased qualified leads by 35% just by responding faster.

Worth a call to map this out for Progressive Products?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Referenced sales team pain point around lead response time, named the company, focused on response speed as a competitive advantage
